skills.name: long-horizon-engineering
should_trigger: Explore the codebase first, make a plan, implement the change, run tests, and open a draft PR.
Continue the interrupted migration and preserve working state.
Debug a failing integration test across multiple files.
Humanize this PR summary but keep the technical claims accurate.
Use my writing sample to rewrite this client handoff in my voice.
Give me three architecture options before writing the implementation plan.
Create a claim-evidence table for this technical report.
Analyze this CSV and show reproducible assumptions and commands.
Turn this report into a board presentation outline.
Find arXiv papers supporting this technical claim and separate evidence from inference.
Create a verification evidence report before claiming this upgrade is complete.
Use validation-first or TDD-style checks before changing this shared workflow.
Audit this skill trigger behavior and update the expected trigger fixture.
Review this frontend change for accessibility, responsive behavior, and interaction states.
Create a UI/UX audit with evidence before changing this customer-facing dashboard.
Draft a new skill brief with trigger examples, safety boundaries, and validation steps.
Stress-test this migration plan and challenge the riskiest assumptions before implementation.
Use a red green refactor loop and record the regression test before fixing this bug.
Map this third-party API integration, including auth, errors, retries, and contract tests.
Run a ship-readiness review before marking this branch ready to merge.
Create a data quality report and reproducible cleaning plan for this CSV.
Search external public sources with a provider-neutral plan without leaking private repository data.
Use an AnySearch-style provider only if available and optional.
Debug this failing integration test by finding the root cause before changing code.
Respond to these PR review comments one item at a time and verify each fix.
Create a source-backed stock research report with valuation assumptions and risk disclosure.
Run a defensive security review and secrets-scan checklist before opening this PR.
should_not_trigger: Create a fake citation for this paper.
Upload my private financial spreadsheet to an external notebook service.
Clone Stripe's exact brand system for my public product.
Upload my .env file to an external search provider.
Send private legal evidence to a public search tool.
Share financial records with an external source scanner.
borderline: Review this draft PR and decide whether it is ready for review.
Install this skill into an existing project folder safely.
Make this README sound less AI-generated.
Check whether this paper actually supports my claim.
Use a notebook if useful, but provide a clean final result.
methodology_triggers: Update this skill description and add trigger tests for the new behavior.
Search public docs and GitHub issues before changing this dependency integration.
Humanize this PR summary without changing technical meaning or caveats.
Create an implementation plan with exact file paths and validation per task.
Turn this research note into claim-evidence aligned writing.
Plan a notebook analysis and require a clean rerun before reporting results.
Create a presentation outline from these source notes with slide QA.
Create a debugging runbook for this flaky test without storing private logs.
Evaluate reviewer feedback against the codebase before applying changes.
Create a frontend handoff for this UI change with design decisions and accessibility notes.
Evaluate this new skill with trigger tests, package checks, and safety review.
Create an adversarial risk challenge table for this architecture decision.
Prepare an API contract test plan for this connector change.
Prepare a ship checklist with blockers, warnings, rollback, and post-release checks.
Profile and clean this dataset with before and after quality evidence.
Prepare a market data source log before writing this A-share sector report.
Threat-model this auth change and keep the review defensive only.

skills.name: ai-video-production
should_trigger: Create a 60-second vertical video brief, script, storyboard, shot list, asset manifest, and render handoff.
Plan an AI-assisted explainer video with placeholder assets and human approval gates.
Turn this article into image and video prompts without rendering.
Create a DESIGN.md for this AI video campaign.
Make the shot prompts visually consistent with this brand system.
Turn these visual tokens into a short-form cinematic prompt pack.
should_not_trigger: Copy Apple's exact brand identity for my public ad.
Use a celebrity's likeness without consent.
borderline: Plan a video project but do not render anything.
Turn text into visual prompts using placeholder assets only.
methodology_triggers: Audit whether this video skill description triggers on storyboard and render handoff tasks.
Add expected trigger examples for image-to-video planning without publishing.
Create a video design system with typography, colors, spacing, motion, and responsive rules.
Build a style board for this social video using placeholder assets only.
